convars.name: fps_max
convars.description: Caps your maximum framerate. Set to 0 for unlimited FPS, or match your monitor's refresh rate to reduce screen tearing.

convars.name: mat_vsync
convars.description: Syncs frames to your monitor's refresh rate. Eliminates screen tearing but adds input lag. Turn OFF for competitive play.

convars.name: gpu_level
convars.description: Master GPU quality preset. Lower values reduce visual quality but significantly boost FPS on weaker graphics cards.

convars.name: cpu_level
convars.description: Master CPU quality preset. Lower values reduce physics and AI complexity. Helps if your CPU is bottlenecking performance.

convars.name: r_farz
convars.description: How far the game renders objects. Lower values improve FPS but distant objects may pop in suddenly. Don't go too low or you'll miss enemies.

convars.name: r_size_cull_threshold
convars.description: Hides small objects that take up little screen space. Higher values = more FPS but small details disappear. Good for potato PCs.

convars.name: r_lod_switch_scale
convars.description: When models switch to lower-detail versions. Lower = switches sooner (more FPS), Higher = keeps detail longer (better visuals).

convars.name: r_shadows
convars.description: Master shadow toggle. Shadows from players, abilities, and moving objects. Turning off gives big FPS gains but removes visual depth.

convars.name: r_citadel_shadow_quality
convars.description: Shadow detail level. Higher = sharper, more realistic shadows. Lower = blurry shadows but better FPS. Off removes them completely.

convars.name: r_shadow_resolution
convars.description: Shadow map pixel resolution. Higher = crisper shadows but uses more VRAM. 1024 is a good balance, 512 for potato mode.

convars.name: csm_quality_level
convars.description: Sun/directional shadow quality. These are the big environmental shadows. Very performance-heavy, turn down for FPS boost.

convars.name: r_citadel_ssao
convars.description: Adds soft shadows in corners and crevices for depth. Makes scenes look more realistic but costs some FPS. Safe to disable.

convars.name: lb_enable_dynamic_lights
convars.description: Lights from abilities, explosions, and projectiles. Looks cool but can tank FPS during big fights. Consider disabling for competitive.

convars.name: lb_enable_stationary_lights
convars.description: Static lights baked into the map (streetlights, signs, etc). Disabling makes the map look flat but saves some performance.

convars.name: r_ssr
convars.description: Real-time reflections on shiny surfaces like water and metal. Very GPU-heavy. Turn off for big FPS gains with minimal visual loss.

convars.name: lb_enable_global_illumination
convars.description: Simulates light bouncing off surfaces. Makes lighting look natural but is expensive. One of the first things to disable for FPS.

convars.name: r_indirect_diffuse
convars.description: Soft indirect lighting that fills in shadows. Part of GI system. Disable along with Global Illumination for max performance.

convars.name: r_drawparticles
convars.description: All particle effects (abilities, explosions, smoke). WARNING: Turning off may hide important ability visuals. Keep ON unless desperate.

convars.name: r_effects_bloom
convars.description: Glowing effect around bright lights and abilities. Purely cosmetic, safe to disable. Some players find it distracting.

convars.name: r_depth_of_field
convars.description: Blurs background when focusing on close objects. Looks cinematic but can obscure enemies. Most competitive players disable this.

convars.name: r_particle_max_detail_level
convars.description: How detailed particle effects are. Lower = simpler effects with fewer particles. Reduces visual clutter and improves FPS.

convars.name: r_citadel_motion_blur
convars.description: Blurs screen when moving or turning fast. Most players hate this - it looks 'cinematic' but makes aiming harder. Leave OFF.

convars.name: r_citadel_fog_quality
convars.description: 3D fog and atmospheric effects. Looks pretty but can obscure vision and costs FPS. Turn off for cleaner visibility.

convars.name: r_decals
convars.description: Bullet holes, scorch marks, blood splatter on surfaces. Purely visual, safe to disable. Helps keep the battlefield clean.

convars.name: r_texture_stream_mip_bias
convars.description: Texture resolution/sharpness. Higher values = blurrier textures but less VRAM usage. Only lower if you're running out of VRAM.

convars.name: r_texturefilteringquality
convars.description: How sharp textures look at angles. Anisotropic filtering (Aniso) keeps textures crisp. Modern GPUs handle 16x easily.

convars.name: r_citadel_antialiasing
convars.description: Smooths jagged edges on objects. Higher = smoother but costs FPS. Low or Medium is usually enough. Off looks jagged but fastest.

convars.name: r_fxaa
convars.description: Fast anti-aliasing that slightly blurs the image. Very cheap performance-wise but can make text/UI look fuzzy. Try it if main AA is too slow.

convars.name: r_citadel_outlines
convars.description: Colored outlines around enemy players. KEEP THIS ON - it's how you spot enemies. Only disable for screenshots/cinematic mode.

convars.name: citadel_trooper_glow_disabled
convars.description: Removes the glow effect on lane minions (troopers). Can reduce visual clutter and help you focus on enemy players.

convars.name: sc_clutter_enable
convars.description: Small environmental debris like trash, papers, small rocks. Purely decorative. Disable for cleaner visuals and tiny FPS gain.

convars.name: r_lod_quality
convars.description: Character and object model complexity. Lower = blockier models but better FPS. Affects how detailed heroes and props look.

convars.name: r_grass
convars.description: Grass and ground vegetation. Can obscure dropped items and add visual noise. Many competitive players turn this off.

convars.name: r_foliage
convars.description: Bushes, leaves, and plant details. Like grass, can create visual clutter. Disabling gives cleaner sightlines.

convars.name: r_fullbright
convars.description: Removes all shadows and lighting, making everything evenly lit. Usually blocked by servers. Looks ugly but maximizes visibility.

convars.name: citadel_camera_hero_fov
convars.description: How wide your camera view is. Higher = see more but things look smaller/farther. 100-110 is popular for competitive. Too high can cause motion sickness.

convars.name: citadel_crosshair_pip_gap
convars.description: Space between crosshair lines and the center. Larger gap = easier to see what you're aiming at. Personal preference.

convars.name: citadel_crosshair_pip_height
convars.description: Length of the crosshair lines. Longer = easier to see but takes up more screen. Shorter = cleaner but harder to track.

convars.name: citadel_crosshair_pip_width
convars.description: Thickness of crosshair lines. Thicker = more visible but blocks more of your view. Find what works for your monitor resolution.

convars.name: citadel_crosshair_pip_opacity
convars.description: How transparent the crosshair lines are. Lower = more see-through. Some prefer faint crosshairs to not obstruct vision.

convars.name: citadel_crosshair_dot_opacity
convars.description: Visibility of the center dot. Set to 0 to remove it entirely. Many players prefer just the lines without a center dot.

convars.name: panorama_disable_blur
convars.description: Blur effect behind menus and UI panels. Disabling removes the frosted glass look but saves some GPU cycles in menus.

convars.name: panorama_disable_box_shadow
convars.description: Drop shadows on UI elements. Purely cosmetic. Disabling makes UI look flatter but slightly improves menu performance.

convars.name: citadel_healthbars_enabled
convars.description: Shows health bars above players and objectives. Essential for gameplay - only disable for screenshots or cinematic recording.

convars.name: citadel_hud_visible
convars.description: Shows all HUD elements (health, abilities, minimap). Only turn off for screenshots. You need this to play properly.

convars.name: citadel_damage_text_lifetime
convars.description: How long damage numbers stay on screen. Shorter = less clutter. Longer = easier to read your damage output.

convars.name: rate
convars.description: Max data the server sends you per second. Set to max (786432) for best hitreg. Only lower if you have very slow internet.

convars.name: cl_interp_ratio
convars.description: How much the game smooths network data. Lower (1) = more responsive but may stutter on bad connections. Higher (2-3) = smoother but slightly more delay.

convars.name: snd_musicvolume
convars.description: In-game music volume. Many competitive players set to 0 to better hear footsteps and ability sounds.

convars.name: snd_mixahead
convars.description: Audio buffer size in seconds. Lower = faster audio response but may crackle on slow PCs. 0.025-0.05 is ideal for competitive.

convars.name: sensitivity
convars.description: How fast your camera moves with mouse input. Lower = more precise aiming, Higher = faster turns. Find what feels natural for you.

convars.name: m_rawinput
convars.description: Bypasses Windows mouse acceleration and processing. ALWAYS keep ON for consistent aim. Only disable if you have weird mouse issues.

convars.name: cl_showfps
convars.description: Displays FPS counter on screen. Simple shows just FPS, Detailed adds frame time and more stats. Useful for testing performance changes.
